name: Chocolate Cherry Lust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt half the chocolate chips with shortening until smooth and stir frequently.
2. Pour the melted chocolate mixture into a foil-lined 10 oz custard cup to make chocolate curls later. Cover and refrigerate.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix flour and sugar in a medium bowl, then cut in butter or margarine until crumbly. Stir in coconut and walnuts. Press mixture evenly into the bottom of a 9x13-inch pan. Bake 12-15 minutes until light golden brown. Cool.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese and confectioner's sugar until smooth; fold in Cool Whip.
5. Spread over cooled crust, top with cherry pie filling. Cover and refrigerate.
6. Melt remaining chocolate chips in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently until melted and smooth. Set aside to cool.
7. In a large bowl, beat both packages of pudding with milk until thickened. Beat in melted chocolate.
8. Carefully spread pudding mixture over cherry filling and chill at least 2 hours.
9. Spread remaining Cool Whip over pudding.
10. Remove foil from molded chocolate in custard cup. Using a vegetable peeler, shave chocolate to form curls. Sprinkle over top of dessert.
